endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/administrators
endpoints.description: Gets a list of managed instance administrators.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/administrators/{administratorName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ADMINISTRATORNAME}} with a real administratorname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/administrators/{administratorName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a managed instance administrator.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ADMINISTRATORNAME}} with a real administratorname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/administrators/{administratorName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ADMINISTRATORNAME}} with a real administratorname.
